title: St. Peter's and the Papal Basilicas of Rome 3D
original_title: San Pietro e le Basiliche Papali di Roma
overview: The unveiled treasures in the year of the Extraordinary Jubilee. The Papal Basilicas of Rome seen as never before: St. Peter's, St. John in the Lateran, St Mary Major, St Paul Outside the Walls and the works of art enshrined within them. A film tour shot from previously unseen points of view with the latest-generation 3D and 4K technology.

trailers.title: Un documental muestra en 3D la belleza de las cuatro basílicas papales de Roma

trailer_groups.title: Un documental muestra en 3D la belleza de las cuatro basílicas papales de Roma
